aPlusContent.title: From the Publisher
aPlusContent.rawText:
From the Publisher
Time-Tested Tools 
Our learning materials have helped educate three generations of kids, creating life-long learners, and the legacy continues. Digital content, flash cards, workbooks, readers, toys and games—all are crafted through a child’s eyes, while integrating parent and teacher standards. 
Writing by Hand Improves Memory 
Writing in workbook pages, as opposed to typing on a computer, can help kids focus and learn. Writing by hand fires up specific areas of a child's brain, improving the ability to both remember what he or she learns and to think of new ideas. 
Longer Retention 
Kids and parents who use our flash cards for practice testing are using one of the most effective learning techniques available. A hundred years of research shows practice testing is highly likely to boost retention. 
Reading Has Lifelong Benefits 
A love of reading has been proven to have far-reaching benefits for children, emotionally and academically. And children who enjoy reading become confident readers and read more often. 
Kids Love Technology 
School Zone’s digital content supports children’s learning goals by enhancing problem-solving and critical thinking, as well as reinforcing skills through multisensory activities. It also improves language skills, increases motivation to stay on task, and stimulates curiosity and imagination. 
Not Just for Fun 
When kids play games together, they learn a healthy sense of competition and experience the joy of winning and empathy for losing. Along the way, they learn collaboration, cooperation, and problem-solving. Creative play stimulates imagination and nurtures emotional well-being.

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I gave this maze book to my almost 3 year old for Christmas and he loves it! He immediately wanted a pencil to do the first maze, which he did on his own (though not completely accurate, and actually took me a minute just now to see the right path, lol). He had already filled up a couple of other maze books, he’s been doing them since the summer. This one seems to be the perfect difficulty level for him to grow with; we haven’t done some of the harder ones yet. There are a lot of animal themed mazes in the book and they are interesting, one is “help the chicken cross the road”. I mainly just wanted one that was fun and interesting for him so he continues to enjoy them, and this hits the mark! I included the first one he did plus a few pictures of random mazes for reference. I would say the age range on the book is correct but it is also interesting enough for late 2’s and early 3’s who enjoy mazes.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on January 9, 2024

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: The age recommendation on the cover of the book is from 4 -6.  The mazes are very simply and easy and younger children would be able to do them.  My 5 year old flew through the book with no problems.  This would have been a good book for him when he was 3 to 4.  The book was way too easy for him.However this would be a good first book to introduce mazes.  There are 64 mazes in the book and the pages are in color.  There is a variety of pictures and scenes that make the book interesting.  It's a good very basic beginnger book.Also the review lists the book as having 3-D glasses included.  There were no glasses included and I did not see anywhere in the book about the book being 3-D.  In the review it states "This text refers to an out of print or unavailable edition of this title." I would not purchase the book expecting it to be a 3-D maze book.

aPlusContent.title: From the Publisher
aPlusContent.rawText:
From the Publisher
Time-Tested Tools 
Our learning materials have helped educate three generations of kids, creating life-long learners, and the legacy continues. Digital content, flash cards, workbooks, readers, toys and games—all are crafted through a child’s eyes, while integrating parent and teacher standards. 
Writing by Hand Improves Memory 
Writing in workbook pages, as opposed to typing on a computer, can help kids focus and learn. Writing by hand fires up specific areas of a child's brain, improving the ability to both remember what he or she learns and to think of new ideas. 
Longer Retention 
Kids and parents who use our flash cards for practice testing are using one of the most effective learning techniques available. A hundred years of research shows practice testing is highly likely to boost retention. 
Reading Has Lifelong Benefits 
A love of reading has been proven to have far-reaching benefits for children, emotionally and academically. And children who enjoy reading become confident readers and read more often. 
Kids Love Technology 
School Zone’s digital content supports children’s learning goals by enhancing problem-solving and critical thinking, as well as reinforcing skills through multisensory activities. It also improves language skills, increases motivation to stay on task, and stimulates curiosity and imagination. 
Not Just for Fun 
When kids play games together, they learn a healthy sense of competition and experience the joy of winning and empathy for losing. Along the way, they learn collaboration, cooperation, and problem-solving. Creative play stimulates imagination and nurtures emotional well-being.

features: GO BEYOND STICKERS, UNLOCK A SECRET STORY: This is NOT your ordinary sticker book. Why? Because every masterpiece your child creates with their own hands unlocks an original, secret story about it! They build the picture, then turn the page to read its adventure. This exclusive "Create-to-Read" feature turns playtime into a rewarding journey of discovery found nowhere else.

A FUN PUZZLE THAT BUILDS ESSENTIAL SKILLS: The numbered sticker challenge works just like a puzzle, guiding your child to bring a vibrant picture to life. This engaging process is more than just fun—it's a powerful way to develop focus, patience, and fine motor skills. Every sticker placed is a step closer to the exciting story reward, keeping them motivated and engaged.

THE ULTIMATE MESS-FREE TRAVEL COMPANION: One book, hours of quiet. Perfect for airplanes, road trips, or restaurants. First, they focus on the sticker activity. Then, they can quietly read the stories they've unlocked. It's a 2-in-1 activity kit that keeps them happily occupied without any screens, crayons, or cleanup. The smartest and quietest toy for any journey.

GIVE A GIFT THAT TELLS A STORY: Stop giving disposable toys. Give an experience. This sticker book is a memorable gift for birthdays and holidays because you're giving a collection of adventures waiting to be built and read. The easy-tear pages are perfect for sharing, allowing multiple kids to work on different themes at a party or in a classroom. It's a gift that sparks both creativity and connection.

DESIGNED FOR KIDS, WITH PARENTS IN MIND: No more tears over torn paper or misplaced stickers! Our special adhesive allows stickers to be gently repositioned for a perfect finish, and the thick paper resists tearing. Made with 100% non-toxic materials and a lay-flat spiral binding for easy use by little hands. We've obsessed over the quality so you can relax and watch the magic happen.

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: Kid-approved and they don’t even know they are learning valuable skills!
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: The kids (4,6) loved this maze book and flew through them.My 4 year old can go through probably a dozen pages at a time and left the more challenging ones for her sister. My 6 year old found some of the mazes to be complicated, but overall they were a good variety to keep them going and not get frustrated.The format of this book is great, going from simple and gradually increasing in complexity of the mazes. It’s a great confidence-booster as kids go through the book.The over-under ones confused my 4 year old a bit, but after some explanation, she was able to figure it out.I love mazes because they’re fun and kids are learning and developing so many necessary skills. For my 4 year old, it’s improving her fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination. For my 6 year old, it’s also helping with cognitive skills, problem-solving, and learning to be patient!At the end of the workbook, the author leaves her contact information for more free printable mazes!

raw_products.bookDescription: Over 160,000 copies sold! Perfect for kids 6-9, this jumbo maze book is packed with more than 175 colorful mazes of various types and levels of challenge. In addition to irresistible traditional mazes, young super solvers will enjoy untangling string mazes, tackling code-word mazes, quiz mazes, number-logic mazes, riddle mazes and more!Fun puzzle themes including animals, sports and space will keep kids engaged while they improve their visual perception, reasoning skills, fine motor control and concentration. The variety of mazes in this book doubles as engaging logic puzzles for kids, helping to strengthen problem-solving abilities and critical thinking while they play. Along with mazes, this 256-page puzzle book is filled with fun and humorous Highlights illustrations kids know and love, making it a standout among maze books for kids and interactive kids books.Kids love a challenge, and completing mazes gives them a feeling of accomplishment with every puzzle solved. The activities in the Jumbo Book of Amazing Mazes are designed to keep puzzlers busy for hours, providing a perfect on-the-go activity book for kids, whether in a waiting room or the car. Developed by the puzzle experts at Highlights, each puzzle is thoughtful, well-constructed and visually appealing to bring kids meaningful benefits and maximum fun.

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: Hours of Fun—One of Our Best Kid Purchases
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: The Jumbo Book of Amazing Mazes has been a favorite in our house for years. My kids can sit with this for hours, completely entertained. With more than 175 colorful mazes across 256 pages, there’s an incredible variety—from simple starter mazes to trickier designs that keep even older kids challenged.The bright illustrations and creative themes make every page feel new, and the large format is perfect for little hands. We’ve taken it on long car rides, to restaurants, and on rainy days at home, and it never fails to keep the kids happily occupied without screens.Pros: Huge variety of maze styles and difficulty levels, sturdy pages, vibrant colors, excellent value for the size.Cons: None worth noting—just be ready to replace it once they’ve solved them all!Truly one of the best activity books we’ve bought. It keeps our kids engaged, sparks problem-solving skills, and gives parents a welcome break.
